description_long: This is a modern multi-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a central open courtyard. The structure features four above-ground levels, each with multiple apartment units arranged symmetrically around the courtyard. The exterior is characterized by large, evenly spaced windows and flat, open balconies on the upper floors. The building's facade is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a muted color palette, likely composed of concrete and glass. The ground floor includes a main entryway with glass doors and a sheltered area, while the rooftop appears to be flat and accessible. The overall design emphasizes functionality, natural light, and communal space.
description: A modern four-story residential building with a central courtyard, large windows, and flat balconies, featuring a minimalist facade.
description_view_0: This view shows one of the shorter sides of the building, highlighting the main entryway at the ground level and the arrangement of windows and balconies above.
description_view_1: This view displays the longer side of the building, revealing the central open courtyard and the symmetrical layout of apartment units and balconies.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite short side with similar window and balcony arrangements, but without a visible main entryway.
description_view_3: This view presents the rear long side of the building, with a clear view of the courtyard opening and the regular pattern of windows and balconies.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass doors, sheltered by an overhang, minimal decorative elements
